本頁整合 Pegvisomant 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of adult patients with acromegaly who have had an inadequate response to surgery and/or radiation therapy and in whom an appropriate medical treatment with somatostatin analogues did not...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>borderline ovarian serous tumor（98.6%）</li>
<li>rete ovarii cystadenoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>ovarian papillary cystadenoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>pyelonephritis（98.6%）</li>
<li>malignant ovarian Brenner tumor（98.6%）</li>
<li>aleukemic mast cell leukemia（98.6%）</li>
<li>ovarian mucinous cystadenofibroma（98.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian benign neoplasm（98.5%）</li>
<li>mucinous ovarian cystadenoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian surface papilloma（98.5%）</li>
<li>serous neoplasm（98.5%）</li>
<li>mucinous ovarian cancer（98.2%）</li>
<li>ovarian clear cell cancer（98.0%）</li>
<li>mucosal melanoma（97.7%）</li>
<li>benign shuddering attacks（97.6%）</li>
<li>extrapyramidal and movement disease（97.6%）</li>
<li>chronic tic disorder（97.5%）</li>
<li>psychogenic movement disorders（97.4%）</li>
<li>ovarian germ cell tumor（97.3%）</li>
<li>primary orthostatic tremor（97.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

  display: inline-block;
  background: #ff9800;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
.news-drug-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #1565c0;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
</style>
